td.style: width:33%; border:none;padding-left:10px;color:#71797E;
width:33%; border:none; padding-left:10px;color:#71797E;
width:33%; border:none; padding-left:10px;color:#71797E;
font-size: 10pt; color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: bold; padding-left:20px;font-weight: bold;
font-size: 10pt; color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: bold; padding-left:20px;font-weight: bold;
font-size: 10pt; color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: bold; padding-left:20px;font-weight: bold;
font-size: 10pt; color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: bold; padding-left:20px;font-weight: bold;
font-size: 10pt; color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: bold; padding-left:20px;font-weight: bold;
font-size: 10pt; color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: bold; padding-left:20px;font-weight: bold;
font-size: 10pt; color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: bold; padding-left:20px;font-weight: bold;
font-size: 10pt; color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: bold; padding-left:20px;font-weight: bold;
font-size: 10pt; color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: bold; padding-left:20px;font-weight: bold;
font-size: 10pt; color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: bold; padding-left:20px;font-weight: bold;
font-size: 10pt; color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: bold; padding-left:20px;font-weight: bold;
font-size: 10pt; color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: bold; padding-left:20px;font-weight: bold;
font-size: 10pt; color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: bold; padding-left:20px;font-weight: bold;
padding-left:20px; width:35%;
width:15%;text-align: right;padding-right:10px;
padding-left:20px; width:30%; text-align:left;
width:20%; color:green;
vertical-align:top; padding:5px;

div.t-att-style: 'border:2px dashed ' + (report_color ) + '; height:80px; width:100%; position:relative; padding:10px; box-sizing:border-box;'

div.style: position:absolute; left:0; right:0; bottom:35px; display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px;

div.t-att-style: ' position:absolute; bottom:0px; left:0;margin:20px 10px 10px 10px; right:0; text-align:center;border-top:2px solid %s;'%report_color

td.style: vertical-align:top; padding:5px;

div.t-att-style: 'border:2px dashed ' + (report_color ) + '; height:80px; width:100%; position:relative; padding:10px; box-sizing:border-box;'

div.style: position:absolute; left:0; right:0; bottom:35px; display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px;

div.t-att-style: ' position:absolute; bottom:0px; left:0;margin:20px 10px 10px 10px; right:0; text-align:center;border-top:2px solid %s;'%report_color
